items.step: Snapshot the stale durable inventory and pivot the repo to the agent-VM implementation campaign
items.notes: Exported .step/st-plan.pre-agent-vm.snapshot.json before replacing the stale March redesign backlog.

items.step: Freeze the breaking root surface and same-package module split for shift, shift_compile, and shift_vm
items.notes: Meta-orchestrator kickoff wave. Lock root exports, module names, forbidden legacy surfaces, and build/package boundaries before implementation branches diverge.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: added stable same-package module fronts shift_compile/shift_vm, cut root exports to Runtime/RuntimeError/With/with/effect.*, and proved with zig build size-check, zig build public-root-contract-snapshot-check, zig build public-error-api-ban, zig build readme-contract.

items.step: Specify ArtifactV1 binary schema, canonical encoding/hash, capability manifest, and reserved versioning space
items.notes: Fresh portable contract; do not promote current ProgramPlan or durable JSON unchanged. Preserve future headroom for session bundles and explicit self-rewrite lineage without implementing them now.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: specified ArtifactV1 binary layout, canonical encoding/hash rules, capability manifest, and reserved versioning space in docs/artifact_v1_contract.md; proved with zig build agent-vm-spec-contract and zig build size-check.

items.step: Specify provider-neutral logged effect envelopes and HostAdapterV1 for model, tool, and durable-state effects
items.notes: Typed effect requests/results only, stable request IDs required, sync-only v1 semantics, canonical global tool IDs, and model turns must support structured tool-call intents.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: specified HostAdapterV1 typed request/result envelopes, request-id discipline, canonical tool IDs, sync-only semantics, and model/tool/durable effect contracts in docs/host_adapter_v1_contract.md; proved with zig build agent-vm-spec-contract and zig build size-check. Broader zig build test remains blocked by the existing open-row cross-file helper-body lane.

items.step: Implement the build/module scaffolding and root export cut for the effects-first public surface
items.notes: Root keeps Runtime, RuntimeError, With/with, and effect.* only. shift_compile and shift_vm become same-package stable modules; compat, Program/run, ir, lowering, interpreter, durable, and ErrorWitnessV1 leave the root.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed in same wave as st-501: build scaffolding now exports shift_compile and shift_vm, root exports were removed from shift, and the split is exercised by size-check plus root snapshot/API-ban/readme gates.

items.step: Implement shift_vm ArtifactV1 structs, encoder/decoder, validator, and readable decode/disasm tooling
items.notes: Operator tooling is part of the contract, not optional polish. The binary format must be deterministic, inspectable, and free of host-layout assumptions.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: implemented shared ArtifactV1 structs plus encode/decode/disasm in src/agent_vm_artifact.zig, exported through shift_vm, and proved with zig build artifact-v1-api-check.

items.step: Implement shift_compile library APIs that lower supported authored programs into ArtifactV1
items.notes: Library-only compiler path: compileSource and compileAndEncode. Internal IR/lowering may be reused, but they are implementation detail, not public truth.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: added shift_compile compileSource/compileAndEncode artifact emission APIs in src/shift_compile_api.zig and proved them with zig build artifact-v1-api-check.

items.step: Implement the synchronous shift_vm Interpreter and HostAdapterV1 execution boundary over logged external effects
items.notes: One shared operational semantics. No hidden host exceptions, no async pending results in v1, and no hidden interpreter-local durable memory.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: implemented HostAdapterV1 request/result/log types in src/host_adapter_v1.zig plus synchronous ArtifactV1 execution in src/artifact_vm_runtime.zig; proved with zig build artifact-vm-runtime-check and zig build artifact-v1-api-check.

items.step: Prove authored-vs-VM parity, typed effect log correctness, and request-ID discipline on the supported corpus
items.notes: This is the semantic center: shift.with(...) behavior and VM artifact behavior must agree before bundle or WASM claims are allowed.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: proved authored-vs-Artifact parity for open_row_state_writer plus typed log/request-id discipline with zig build artifact-vm-runtime-check and zig build artifact-v1-api-check.

items.step: Ship the host-adapter conformance kit and operator-facing ArtifactV1 inspection workflow
items.notes: Meta-orchestrator should treat this as a real deliverable, not docs-only cleanup: conformance checks, readable decode/disasm, and operator usage proof all belong here.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: shipped HostAdapterV1 conformance helper/test plus ArtifactV1 dump workflow; proved with zig build host-adapter-conformance-check and zig build artifact-v1-dump.

items.step: Implement exact-build BundleEnvelopeV1 export/import and deterministic capability/build mismatch rejection
items.notes: First portability milestone is same-build cross-host handoff. Bundle structure must leave room for signatures later, but signatures are not required in this wave.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: implemented BundleEnvelopeV1 export/import with exact-build fingerprint rejection in src/bundle_envelope_v1.zig; proved with zig build bundle-envelope-v1-check.

items.step: Bring up native-to-WASM ArtifactV1 decode, validate, and execute parity on the same supported corpus
items.notes: WASM is close-behind, not distant. The same artifact bytes must decode and execute with matching semantics in both runtimes before the portability story is considered real.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed: brought up native-to-WASM ArtifactV1 parity with tools/artifact_vm_state_writer_runner.zig, test/artifact_vm_wasm_parity/run.sh, wasmtime-installed execution, and proved with zig build artifact-vm-wasm-parity-check.

items.step: Run the closure bundle for the root/compiler/vm/handoff/WASM campaign and capture durable proof comments
items.notes: Closure bar: root export contract, compiler tests, artifact roundtrip/hash stability, authored-vs-VM parity, host-adapter conformance, exact-build handoff proof, and native-vs-WASM parity all green with evidence recorded back into $st comments.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Completed closure bundle: zig build size-check, public-root-contract-snapshot-check, public-error-api-ban, readme-contract, agent-vm-spec-contract, artifact-v1-api-check, artifact-vm-runtime-check, host-adapter-conformance-check, artifact-v1-dump, bundle-envelope-v1-check, artifact-vm-wasm-parity-check, and git diff --check all passed.
